name: Integration - LLMService Fallback on API Failure
description: Tests that LLMService.classify_email returns FALLBACK_RESPONSE when the LLM API fails after retries, and that this propagates through EmailPhishingDetectionAgent.analyze_emails.
input: A RawEmail with valid content, but LLMService is mocked to raise Exception on all attempts.
error_scenarios: Agent handles exception and returns fallback
